allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\leohk\\Where-to-live-in-London-v3"; $key = \(Get-Content .env -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-String "TFL_APP_KEY" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split "=",2\)[1].Trim\(\) }\); $env:TFL_APP_KEY = $key; npx tsx scripts/fetch-tfl-commutes.ts)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(m.get\('id'\), m.get\('name'\)\) for m in d.get\('matches',[]\)]")

PowerShell($key = \(Get-Content "c:\\Users\\leohk\\Where-to-live-in-London-v3\\.env" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-String "TFL_APP_KEY" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split "=",2\)[1].Trim\(\) }\); Write-Host "Key found: $\($key.Length -gt 0\)"; $r1 = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.tfl.gov.uk/StopPoint/Search/South%20Kensington%20Underground%20Station?modes=tube&maxResults=5&app_key=$key"; $r1.matches | Select-Object id, name; Write-Host "---"; $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.tfl.gov.uk/StopPoint/Search/London%20Bridge%20Underground%20Station?modes=tube&maxResults=5&app_key=$key"; $r2.matches | Select-Object id, name)

PowerShell($env_content = Get-Content "c:\\Users\\leohk\\Where-to-live-in-London-v3\\.env" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $key = \($env_content | Where-Object { $_ -match "^TFL_APP_KEY=" }\) -replace "^TFL_APP_KEY=",""; Write-Host "Key length: $\($key.Length\)"; $key)

PowerShell($key = "7bd3a559be374749a598780bb5a8e46c"; $r1 = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.tfl.gov.uk/StopPoint/Search/South%20Kensington%20Underground%20Station?modes=tube&maxResults=5&app_key=$key"; Write-Host "=== South Kensington ==="; $r1.matches | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.id\)  $\($_.name\)" }; $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.tfl.gov.uk/StopPoint/Search/London%20Bridge%20Underground%20Station?modes=tube&maxResults=5&app_key=$key"; Write-Host "=== London Bridge ==="; $r2.matches | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.id\)  $\($_.name\)" })

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\leohk\\Where-to-live-in-London-v3"; $env:TFL_APP_KEY = "7bd3a559be374749a598780bb5a8e46c"; $t = [System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); npx tsx scripts/fetch-tfl-commutes.ts; $t.Stop\(\); Write-Host "`nTotal time: $\([math]::Round\($t.Elapsed.TotalSeconds, 1\)\)s")
